hero.headline: Modern Swiss cuisine married to the purity and rigor of Nordic philosophy.
hero.subtext: Raw ingredients sourced from our local farms and lake, elevated by salt, fire, and wild fermentation.

experience.label: The experience
experience.title: A better night out, end to end
experience.step1Body: Pick your party size and time. We check live capacity so you never double-book.
experience.step2Body: Mobile-friendly digital menu with prices and allergen info at your table.
experience.step3Body: Your order flows straight to the kitchen display for fast, accurate service.
